overview: Chalapathi Institute of Technology (CIT), established in 2008, is a private engineering college located in Mothadaka, Guntur district. Often confused with its sister concern (CIET), CIT focuses on providing diverse technical education across diploma, undergraduate, and postgraduate levels. The institute is known for its academic discipline and for catering specifically to the educational needs of the rural and semi-urban student population in Andhra Pradesh.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, AI, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats are Convener Quota (Category A) based on entrance exam ranks (AP EAPCET/POLYCET/PGECET). 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP POLYCET 2026: April 24–25, 2026; AP PGECET 2026: April 27, 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: The campus is located at A.R. Nagar, Mothadaka, which is roughly 20 km from Guntur city. It is noted for its high academic ratings from students and a significant faculty-to-student ratio (approx. 1:13) which allows for personalized attention.

contact.address: A.R. Nagar, Mothadaka, Tadikonda Mandal, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh - 522016
